/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-undefined CMakeFiles/sail_riscv_sim.dir/sail_riscv_sim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sail_riscv_sim.dir/riscv_sim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sail_riscv_sim.dir/cli_options.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sail_riscv_sim.dir/rvfi_dii.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sail_riscv_sim.dir/riscv_callbacks_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sail_riscv_sim.dir/riscv_callbacks_rvfi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sail_riscv_sim.dir/traploop_detector.cpp.o -o sail_riscv_sim  libriscv_model.a ../dependencies/softfloat/libsoftfloat.a ../sail_runtime/libsail_runtime.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so
